name: Magical Scientist
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サイエンティスト
desc: Pay 1000 Life Points to Special Summon 1 level 6 or lower Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck in face-up Attack or Defense Position. That Fusion Monster cannot attack your opponent's Life Points directly, and is returned to your Extra Deck at the end of the turn.
mnst_eff: Pay 1000 Life Points to Special Summon 1 level 6 or lower Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck in face-up Attack or Defense Position. That Fusion Monster cannot attack your opponent's Life Points directly, and is returned to your Extra Deck at the end of the turn.
eff: Pay 1000 Life Points to Special Summon 1 level 6 or lower Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck in face-up Attack or Defense Position. That Fusion Monster cannot attack your opponent's Life Points directly, and is returned to your Extra Deck at the end of the turn.

action: Returns from field to Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
